title: Wendy's Isn't Mid!
description: A unofficial food mod which adds items from the popular fast food chain Wendy's.
body:
**Where's the Beef?**

This mod adds different foods and items based on the Wendy's fast food chain, with slightly vanilla-friendly crafting recipes.

**This mod is unofficial and has no affiliation with the Wendy's company or brand.**

## **Current Items:**
- French Fries
- Chicken Nuggets
- HamBurger
- American Cheese
- Chocolate Frosty
- Vanilla Frosty
- Coca Cola
- Food Cup
